zh.Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandy: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱凱 7 坎頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviers於從1090年到1115年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱凱 7 坎頓。她於1115年與Governor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvis在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reviers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French   Riviere   and possibly also of Dutch   Revier  .
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Riviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Camille, Firmin, Hermite, Lucien, Monique, Stephane.

French (Rivière): topographic name for someone who lived by the bank of a river or shore of a lake, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’ (originally meaning ‘riverbank’, from Latin riparia); or a habitational name from any of various places called (La) Rivière, for example in Indre-et-Loire and Pas-de-Calais. Compare Lariviere 1 and 2.
History: Joseph Rivière from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Félicité Audet in Carleton, QC, in 1795.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviers was born from 1090 to 1115, in Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France. She married Governor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvis in 1115, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviers est née du 1090 au 1115, à Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, France. Elle a épousé Governor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvis en 1115, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviers wurde von 1090 bis 1115 in Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1115 in Gloucestershire, England Governor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

ja.Dewich, Dorsetshire, England: イギリスイギリスドールセト
ja.Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandy: フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスケンケン 7 カントン
ja.Gloucestershire, England and Carn France: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviersはから1090年まで1115年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスケンケン 7 カントンで生まれた。1115年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでGovernor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandy: 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 카이 카이 7 캔턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviers(은)는 1090년 부터 1115년 까지 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 카이 카이 7 캔턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1115년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Governor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.Caen 7e Canton, Caen, Calvados, Normandy: каен 7 кантон, каен, калвадос, норманди, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise de Reviers родилась с 1090 по 1115 в местности каен 7 кантон, каен, калвадос, норманди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Governor of Caen Robert the First de Gouvis в 1115 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
